title: Coelogyne laetitia-reginae
taxonomy: Coelogyne laetitia-reginae is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is classified as a type of epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants, typically trees, in its natural habitat. Coelogyne laetitia-reginae is native to Thailand and is often found in forests and woodland areas. The orchid is typically found in areas with high humidity and moderate to bright light conditions. Its classification also includes the genus Coelogyne, which is a group of orchids that are known for their showy and fragrant flowers.
